TIP.START_TOURNAMENT_CONTENT_1: Starting the tournament will create a tournament plan
TIP.START_TOURNAMENT_CONTENT_2: where the players will randomly play with each other.
TIP.START_TOURNAMENT_CONTENT_3: Important! You can't change the settings any longer after the start.
TIP.LEG_INPUT_CONTENT_2: Type the points left for the loser
TIP.FINISH_ROUND_BUTTON_CONTENT_1: As soon as all legs of this round are done you have
TIP.FINISH_ROUND_BUTTON_CONTENT_2: to finish the round to start the next round

ERROR_MESSAGE.MIN_PLAYERS: The minimum amount of players is 4
ERROR_MESSAGE.MAX_PLAYERS: The maximum amount of players is 128
ERROR_MESSAGE.EMPTY_PLAYER_NAME: Player name must not be empty
